mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, target_type, target_id, mode, start_offset, total_questions, answered_questions, correct_answers, status FROM quiz_sessions WHERE id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE quiz_sessions SET status = CASE WHEN answered_questions + 1 >= total_questions THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE status END, finished_at = CASE WHEN answered_questions + 1 >= total_questions THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE finished_at END, answered_questions = answered_questions + 1, correct_answers = correct_answers + #{correctIncrement} WHERE id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qa.is_correct = 1 AND qa.wrong_submissions = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS correct_attempts, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN qa.wrong_submissions > 0 OR qa.selected_option IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_attempts FROM quiz_attempts qa JOIN quiz_sessions qs ON qs.id = qa.session_id WHERE qa.user_id = #{userId} AND qs.target_type = #{targetType} AND qs.target_id = #{targetId} AND DATE(COALESCE(qa.answered_at, qa.created_at)) = CURRENT_DATE
